misc: Struggles with his gender identity, occasionally participating in events under his female alter-ego, "Eva".
biography: Marcus, a familiar face from Kurk Golf, brings a unique flair to the greens. With a consistently steady hand and a strategic mind, Marcus has become a respected competitor.

Off the course, Marcus is known for his introspective nature and his journey of self-discovery. Those close to Marcus know that they sometimes participates in tournaments under the guise of Eva, embracing their female alter ego with confidence and grace. This duality adds an intriguing layer to Marcus's already compelling persona, reflecting a depth of character that few possess.

Having participated in each Hector Trophée since its inception, Marcus is now gearing up for their thirteenth appearance in the prestigious tournament. While the Hector Trophée and Victor trophy have eluded Marcus thus far, their unwavering determination and commitment to the sport make them a player to watch in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026.
